use_cases: Interactive feature highlights that reveal details on hover
Product or service cards with attention-grabbing visual effects
Dashboard widgets that need to draw user focus
Landing page sections requiring eye-catching hover states
Card-based layouts where mouse tracking adds engagement
ai_summary: A dark-themed card component with a mouse-tracking spotlight effect that reveals a radial gradient centered on the cursor position when hovering. The spotlight fades in smoothly and follows the mouse, creating an elegant glass-morphism-like glow effect. Ideal for interactive feature showcases, product cards, or any card-based UI that benefits from attention-grabbing hover states in SaaS, fintech, or e-commerce contexts.
